title: Heart&Beyond
description: Fresh beautifull world with create mechanism
body:
![Heart&Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b5cd7380f9e32104f68665bb6571fb4421d73a6.png)

### Modpack review

- Combine of the enchansed vanilla visual and dungeon with Create mod and more fun.
- Since modern minecraft version does not provide all solutions to my wishlist i will try to update this pack with all possible innovations of versions 1.21.10+ and much more. 
- The build excludes shaders and is based only on resource packs and mods for the visual part. 
  

![Heart&Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3779adc9df728d9e4e8779a97e2794fffc8d034.png)


### Whats to do?

Starting with version 3.0, the build is designed to include **updated biomes, dimensions, and structures in the world.** The visual part is inspired by the modpack of the blogger EnderVerse Fresh&Smooth and has been almost completely migrated to version 1.21.1. The basis for the adventures is mod **Create** and most importantly... **hamsters** 0_0
![Heart&Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0396bff49e1daea38e5e500f87e652ef83fd7bd.png)
